---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a bug report to help us improve the project.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**Description of the Error**
[A clear and concise description of what the Error/Bug exactly is happening.]

**Steps to reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Execute '....'
3. See the error that appears in the console or screen

**Expected Behavior**
[A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen instead of the error.]

**Screenshots or Console Logs**
[If applicable, add screenshots or copy and paste the error text that appears in the node/terminal console.]

**Execution Environment:**

- Operating System: [ej. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js Version: [ej. v18.16.0]
- Other information: [ej. Affected libraries such as whatsapp-web.js version X]
